summary: Implemented reduced-motion fallback (US-024): added `watchReducedMotion` live listener to signals.ts with matchMedia safety guard; wired it into renderLoop.ts so mid-session OS preference changes are picked up; scaled pointer disturbance, treble jitter, and sparkle shimmer by `motionAmplitude` in particleField.ts; created 11 acceptance tests in reducedMotion.test.ts covering all 4 acceptance criteria; added 2 tests for the live listener in signals.test.ts; fixed pre-existing missing fields in bassMotion.test.ts defaultParams. Build passes, all US-024 tests pass (13/13), 2 pre-existing bassMotion test failures remain unrelated to this ticket.
